title: Design
description: Candidate technical design from the propose node (producer). Carries the decision under review, the recommended option, and the alternatives the adjudicate debate will stress-test. Matches the inlined S.propose_schema table in workflow.js.

decision.description: The technical design question being decided (one sentence).

recommendation.description: The single option this design recommends. Must be one of options[].name.

options.description: Candidate options considered, including the recommended one.

summary.description: What the option is and how it works.

tradeoffs.description: Why the recommendation wins over the alternatives. One entry per material axis (cost, latency, complexity, risk, etc.).

note.description: How the recommendation compares on this axis.

revision_note.description: On a re-proposal, what changed to address the prior verdict's concerns. Empty on the first proposal.
